top_5_fixes: Add schema-level pattern for external DataSourceID fields when standardized in candidate outputs.
Add cross-field schema rules for scorecard-evidence to KPI claim mapping via explicit IDs.
Introduce CI checks to validate manifest freshness and prevent stale validation artifacts.
Expand RiskIDs schema to allow explicit severity-qualified tags while preserving validator compatibility.
Publish a traceability style guide to standardize SourceTag and EvidenceID authoring across contributors.
